title: April 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 9''' is the 99th (100th on leap years) day of the year. There are 266 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1979]] – [[Brandon Badeaux]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 111|''Star Wars Weekly'' 111]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]] published.
*2003 – [[Republic 52|''Republic'' 52]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi, Volume 2]]'' published.
*2008 – "[[Labor Pains]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[Didj Star Wars: Jedi Trials]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – "[[The Zillo Beast]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 16|''Star Wars'' (2013) 16]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 10: The Escape]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Search and Find Volume I]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Icons: Han Solo]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Malcolm Dixon]] dies.
*2020 – [[Mort Drucker]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The Living Force]]'' published.
*2024 – [[The Living Force (audiobook)|''The Living Force'' audiobook]] released.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Vol. 8 – Dark Droids]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian — Season Two, Part Two]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 2|''Jedi Knights'' 2]] published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars (1977) 1|''Star Wars'' (1977) 1 ''Facsimile Edition'']] reprinted.
<noinclude>
